title: Pasuram 1
original:
patti mudalām avaṟṟil padi eṉakkuk kūḍāmal ⋆
ettiśaiyum uzaṉṟōḍi ilaittu vizum kāgam pōl ⋆
muttitarum nagar ēzil mukkiyamām kacci taṉil ⋆
attigiri arulāḷarkku aḍaikkalam nāṉ pugundēṉē
split_lines: patti | mudalām | avaṟṟil | padi | eṉakkuk | kūḍāmal | ⋆
ettiśaiyum | uzaṉṟōḍi | ilaittu | vizum | kāgam | pōl | ⋆
muttitarum | nagar | ēzil | mukkiyamām | kacci | taṉil | ⋆
attigiri | arulāḷarkku | aḍaikkalam | nāṉ | pugundēṉē

title: Pasuram 2
original:
saḍaimuḍiyaṉ sadurmugaṉ eṉṟu ivar mudalām taram ellām ⋆
aḍaiya viṉai ppayaṉ āgi azinduviḍum paḍi kaṇḍu ⋆
kaḍi malarāl piriyāda kacci nagar attigiri ⋆
iḍam uḍaiya arulāḷar iṉai aḍigal aḍaindēṉē
split_lines: saḍaimuḍiyaṉ | sadurmugaṉ | eṉṟu | ivar | mudalām | taram | ellām | ⋆
aḍaiya | viṉai | ppayaṉ | āgi | azinduviḍum | paḍi | kaṇḍu | ⋆
kaḍi | malarāl | piriyāda | kacci | nagar | attigiri | ⋆
iḍam | uḍaiya | arulāḷar | iṉai | aḍigal | aḍaindēṉē

title: Pasuram 3
original:
tantiraṅgal vēriṉṟi tamadu vazi aziyādu ⋆
mantiraṅgal tammālum maṟṟum uḷa uraiyālum ⋆
antaram kaṇḍaḍi paṇivār ellārkkum aruḷ puriyum ⋆
sindura verpiraiyavaṉār śīlam alladaṟiyēṉē
split_lines: tantiraṅgal | vēriṉṟi | tamadu | vazi | aziyādu | ⋆
mantiraṅgal | tammālum | maṟṟum | uḷa | uraiyālum | ⋆
antaram | kaṇḍaḍi | paṇivār | ellārkkum | aruḷ | puriyum | ⋆
sindura | verpiraiyavaṉār | śīlam | alladaṟiyēṉē

title: Pasuram 4
original:
kāgam irākkadaṉ maṉṉar kādali kattirabaṉdu ⋆
nāgam araṉ ayaṉ mudalā nāganagarār tamakkum ⋆
pōgam uyar vīḍu peṟa poṉ aruḷ seydamai kaṇḍu ⋆
nāgamalai nāyagaṉār nal aḍi ppōdaḍaindēṉē
split_lines: kāgam | irākkadaṉ | maṉṉar | kādali | kattirabaṉdu | ⋆
nāgam | araṉ | ayaṉ | mudalā | nāganagarār | tamakkum | ⋆
pōgam | uyar | vīḍu | peṟa | poṉ | aruḷ | seydamai | kaṇḍu | ⋆
nāgamalai | nāyagaṉār | nal | aḍi | ppōdaḍaindēṉē

title: Pasuram 5
original:
ugakkum avai ugandu ugavā aṉaittum ozindu ⋆
uravu kuṇam miga ttuṇivu peṟa uṇarndu ⋆
viyaṉ kāval eṉa varittu śagattil oru pugal illāt ⋆
tavam aṟiyēṉ madiṭkacci nagarkkaruṇai nādaṉai nal aḍaikkalamāy aḍaindēṉē
split_lines: ugakkum | avai | ugandu | ugavā | aṉaittum | ozindu | ⋆
uravu | kuṇam | miga | ttuṇivu | peṟa | uṇarndu | ⋆
viyaṉ | kāval | eṉa | varittu | śagattil | oru | pugal | illāt | ⋆
tavam | aṟiyēṉ | madiṭkacci | nagarkkaruṇai | nādaṉai | nal | aḍaikkalamāy | aḍaindēṉē

title: Pasuram 6
original:
alavuḍaiyār aḍaindārkkum adaṉ uraiyē koṇḍavarkkum ⋆
valavurai tandavaṉ aruḷē maṉṉiya mā tavattōrkkum ⋆
kaḷavozivār emar eṉṉa iśaindavarkkum kāvalarām ⋆
tuḷava muḍi aruḷ varadar tuvakkil eṉai vaittēṉē
split_lines: alavuḍaiyār | aḍaindārkkum | adaṉ | uraiyē | koṇḍavarkkum | ⋆
valavurai | tandavaṉ | aruḷē | maṉṉiya | mā | tavattōrkkum | ⋆
kaḷavozivār | emar | eṉṉa | iśaindavarkkum | kāvalarām | ⋆
tuḷava | muḍi | aruḷ | varadar | tuvakkil | eṉai | vaittēṉē

title: Pasuram 7
original:
umadaḍigal aḍaigiṉṟēṉ eṉṟu oru kāl uraittavarai ⋆
ameiyum iṉi eṉbavar pōl añjal eṉa kkaram vaittu ⋆
tamadaṉaittum avar tamakkum vazaṅgiyum tām miga viḷaṅgum ⋆
amaivuḍaiya arulāḷar aḍi iṉaiyai aḍaindēṉē
split_lines: umadaḍigal | aḍaigiṉṟēṉ | eṉṟu | oru | kāl | uraittavarai | ⋆
amaiyum | iṉi | eṉbavar | pōl | añjal | eṉa | kkaram | vaittu | ⋆
tamadaṉaittum | avar | tamakkum | vazaṅgiyum | tām | miga | viḷaṅgum | ⋆
amaiivuḍaiya | arulāḷar | aḍi | iṉaiyai | aḍaindēṉē

title: Pasuram 8
original:
tiṇmai kuṟaiyāmaikkum niṟaigaikkum tī viṉaiyāl ⋆
uṇmai maṟavāmaikkum uḷa madiyil ugakkaikkum ⋆
taṇmai kazhiyāmaikkum taṟikkaikkum taṇigaikkum ⋆
vaṇmaiyuḍai arulāḷar vāśagaṅgaḷ maṟavēṉē
split_lines: tiṇmai | kuṟaiyāmaikkum | niṟaigaikkum | tī | viṉaiyāl | ⋆
uṇmai | maṟavāmaikkum | uḷa | madiyil | ugakkaikkum | ⋆
taṇmai | kazhiyāmaikkum | taṟikkaikkum | taṇigaikkum | ⋆
vaṇmaiyuḍai | arulāḷar | vāśagaṅgaḷ | maṟavēṉē

title: Pasuram 9
original:
śurudi niṉaivivai aṟiyum tuṇivuḍaiyār tūy mozigal ⋆
paridi madi āśiriyar pāśuram śērndarukkaṇaṅgal ⋆
karudi oru teḷivāḷāl kalakkam aṟuttattigiri ⋆
paridi madi nayaṉam uḍai paramaṉ aḍi paṇindēṉē
split_lines: śurudi | niṉaivivai | aṟiyum | tuṇivuḍaiyār | tūy | mozigal | ⋆
paridi | madi | āśiriyar | pāśuram | śērndarukkaṇaṅgal | ⋆
karudi | oru | teḷivāḷāl | kalakkam | aṟuttattigiri | ⋆
paridi | madi | nayaṉam | uḍai | paramaṉ | aḍi | paṇindēṉē

title: Pasuram 10
original:
tirumagaḷum tiruvaḍivum tiruvaruḷum teḷ aṟivum ⋆
arumai ilāmaiyum uṟavum aḷappariya aḍi arasum ⋆
karumam azhippalippamilippum kalakkam ilā vagai niṉṟa ⋆
aruḷ varadar nilai ilakkil ambeṉa nāṉ amizndēṉē
split_lines: tirumagaḷum | tiruvaḍivum | tiruvaruḷum | teḷ | aṟivum | ⋆
arumai | ilāmaiyum | uṟavum | aḷappariya | aḍi | arasum | ⋆
karumam | azhippalippamilippum | kalakkam | ilā | vagai | niṉṟa | ⋆
aruḷ | varadar | nilai | ilakkil | ambeṉa | nāṉ | amizndēṉē

title: Pasuram 11
original:
āṟu payaṉ vēṟillā aḍiyavargaḷ aṉaivarkkum ⋆
āṟum adaṉ payaṉum ivai oru kālum pala kālum ⋆
āṟu payaṉ eṉavē kaṇḍu aruḷāḷar aḍi iṉai mēl ⋆
kūṟiya naṟkuṇa uraigaḷ ivai pattum kōdilavē
split_lines: āṟu | payaṉ | vēṟillā | aḍiyavargaḷ | aṉaivarkkum | ⋆
āṟum | adaṉ | payaṉum | ivai | oru | kālum | pala | kālum | ⋆
āṟu | payaṉ | eṉavē | kaṇḍu | aruḷāḷar | aḍi | iṉai | mēl | ⋆
kūṟiya | naṟkuṇa | uraigaḷ | ivai | pattum | kōdilavē
